title: Privacy Policy
heading: Privacy Policy
intro: BarkinMad Studios respects your privacy and aims to keep its apps and website simple, safe, and transparent.

sections.heading: Information Collection
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios may collect limited anonymous technical or usage information through apps, website analytics, advertising services, and platform providers.
Personal information is not knowingly collected unless voluntarily provided through support or contact enquiries.

sections.heading: Game Center
paragraphs: Some games may use Apple Game Center for achievements, leaderboards, and score tracking.
Game Center data is managed by Apple and subject to Apple's own privacy policies and account settings.

sections.heading: Advertising
paragraphs: Some apps or website pages may display advertisements provided by third-party advertising networks such as Google AdSense or Google AdMob.
Advertising providers may use cookies, device identifiers, or similar technologies to measure performance and display personalised or non-personalised advertisements.

sections.heading: Analytics
paragraphs: Analytics services may collect anonymous technical information such as device type, operating system version, app usage, gameplay statistics, crash reports, and general interaction data.
This information is used to improve app stability, gameplay experience, and future updates.

sections.heading: In-App Purchases
paragraphs: Some apps may offer optional in-app purchases such as removing advertisements or unlocking additional features.
All purchases and payment processing are handled securely through Apple and are subject to Apple's own payment and privacy policies.

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
paragraphs: Apps and website pages may contain links or integrations with third-party platforms including Apple, Google, Facebook, analytics services, and social media providers.
These third-party services operate under their own privacy policies and terms.

sections.heading: Children's Privacy
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios does not knowingly collect personal information from children.
If you believe personal information has been unintentionally collected, please contact support@barkinmad.studio.

sections.heading: Data Security
paragraphs: Reasonable measures are taken to help protect apps, services, and website functionality.
However, no internet-based service or storage system can be guaranteed to be completely secure.

sections.heading: Policy Updates
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically as apps, services, website functionality, or legal requirements change.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For privacy questions, support, or enquiries, please contact support@barkinmad.studio.
